name: Greed's Folly
short_description: Throw teleportation bottles to climb an impossible magical library in this brutal platformer. One wrong throw sends you plummeting back to the start. How far can you ascend before greed becomes your downfall?
detailed_description:
The Plan is Simple: Get to the Top and Get Out

Greed's Folly is a punishing 2D climbing game where precision matters and failure is unforgiving. You are a greedy guy named Grizzle who has stolen an ancient magical recipe for the philosopher's stone so that he can make infinite gold. Now trapped deep underground, you must throw magical teleportation bottles to navigate upward through enchanted obstacles, treacherous hazards, and impossible architecture.

One Throw. One Chance. One Way Out?

Using only your mouse, aim and charge your throws to launch bouncy bottles that teleport you to wherever they land. But be warned... The library is alive with magic and danger. Slopes will send your bottle rolling, mysterious forces will push and pull it, and the environment itself conspires against your escape. Every section introduces new surprises that will test your skill, patience, and resolve.

A Living, Breathing Library

The magical library is a vertical labyrinth of wonder and peril. Ancient stone gives way to bubbling alchemical chambers. Enchanted books float and shift. Nature reclaims forgotten halls. Steam-powered mechanisms tick and hiss. Each section is distinct, unforgiving, and you'll need to master them all.

Fall and Fall Again

There are no checkpoints. One mistake can send you plummeting back to the beginning, losing minutes or even hours of progress. Greed's Folly doesn't hold your hand. It pushes you off the ledge. But with each attempt, you'll learn the patterns, master the physics, and inch closer to whatever awaits at the top.

More Than Just Climbing

- Discover hidden collectibles that unlock cosmetic rewards

- Meet mysterious inhabitants scattered throughout the library

- Track your journey with detailed statistics

- Compete on Steam leaderboards for the fastest ascent

Features:

- Brutal gameplay with physics-based teleportation mechanics

- Multiple distinct hand-crafted sections, each with unique challenges

- Beautiful pixel art environments with parallax backgrounds

- Atmospheric original soundtrack that evolves as you climb

- Hidden secrets and character encounters

- No checkpoints, fall and start over

- Full controller support

- Optional CRT filter for authentic retro feel

- Complete solo-developed experience: all art, music, and sound by one creator

Will you escape the library, or will greed be your folly?
